# [Phase 3] Implement Shape C: Bridge Daemon Fallback

**Origin Session ID:** `27016011-8ae9-48bb-af87-9479dd5b0fd0`

## Intent
Implement Shape C (Bridge Daemon Fallback) for the Phase 3 autonomous wake substrate, per **ADR 0002**.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Implement the long-running daemon watching the `GraphLog` via `syncCache` pattern.
- [ ] Implement per-harness adapters (tmux, osascript).
- [ ] Ensure co-existence with MCP server's `syncCache` without interference.
- [ ] Build against the contract defined in `learn/agentos/decisions/0002-phase3-wake-substrate-standards-alignment.md` §6.3.
